mandate: Audits for video/audio encoding/decoding and performance optimization in remoting/codec/.

checklist.frame_params_tuning: Verify that FrameParams are correctly populated to optimize bitrate and quality.
checklist.active_map_usage: Understand usage of active map for quality top-off in specific codecs like VP8.
checklist.callback_safety: Ensure that encode callbacks are not called if the encoder is destroyed.
checklist.performance_tracking: Verify that FrameStats are correctly populated to track encoding performance.
checklist.vp9_i444_profile: Understand that VP9 profile 1 (I444) is used for lossless color support.
checklist.vp8_linux_thread_limit: Be aware that VP8 encoding on Linux may need to limit threads to avoid high CPU usage under stress.
checklist.benchmark_memory_cap: Be aware that benchmarking may need to cap frame count to save memory (e.g. 4K frames are large).
